prompt: Premium horizontal brand logo layout for 'LK Design and Build', a luxury home renovation and interior design company. The logo is displayed horizontally on a clean white background: on the left, an elegant geometric monogram of 'L' and 'K' intertwined with architectural precision in charcoal (#2C2C2C), separated by a thin vertical gold (#C9A96E) line, and on the right 'LK DESIGN AND BUILD' stacked in two lines of refined uppercase sans-serif text. The whole composition is horizontal/landscape oriented. Photographed as a brand identity presentation printed on premium white textured stock, 50mm lens, f/4.0, ISO 100, soft even studio lighting. Clean, minimal, no extra decorative elements. Subtle paper texture visible.
